answer_text: Articles 2, 4, 5, and 7 of Law No. 12 of 2004 are explicitly superseded by Law No. 16 of 2011, as stated in Article 1 of the amending law (cite: be59024d9c82dbc4a8b716e94bd1169387066998e415fb598e677eb9ad104c29:0:1:ff56313c) (cite: 2367e45430240e0210f1c54962e7e3a96b6b0908c56e01eb77ced99e114d61be:0:1:0501c8ec) (cite: 2367e45430240e0210f1c54962e7e3a96b6b0908c56e01eb77ced99e114d61be:6:0:5fd9479e). Article 4 of Law No. 12 of 2004, which was superseded, primarily addressed the duties and powers of the Chief Justice of the Courts, including general supervision and specific administrative functions (cite: 2367e45430240e0210f1c54962e7e3a96b6b0908c56e01eb77ced99e114d61be:1:2:f2ce4b20).

answer_text: Article 6(3) of the Data Protection Law 2020, as amended by Law No. 1 of 2025, clarifies that the law applies to processing of Personal Data in the DIFC by a Controller or Processor (or their Sub-processors), regardless of place of incorporation, as part of stable arrangements and not on an occasional basis, and specifies that processing “in the DIFC” occurs when the means or personnel used are physically located in the DIFC (cite: ef59bbc482cdca0268be35906d6274916740cb92a17c5d5d914b0f09807154f7:3:0:2ae7fd31). This amendment refines the scope of application to focus on stable, non-occasional processing activities physically conducted in the DIFC (cite: ef59bbc482cdca0268be35906d6274916740cb92a17c5d5d914b0f09807154f7:3:0:2ae7fd31).

answer_text: The Enactment Notice provides that the DIFC Laws Amendment Law, DIFC Law No. 8 of 2018, was enacted on 5 November 2018 and came into force on the 5th business day after enactment. This law amended both the Limited Partnership Law (DIFC Law No. 4 of 2006) and the Trust Law (DIFC Law No. 4 of 2018) as indicated in their respective consolidated versions. 1. in the form now attached the Real Property Law Amendment Law 2024: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: a3ac668ff1a2630ae4826e239487862831558f29e896186631f72ab30a713ac4:0:0:86a6ccf1, e822a7554e725938959c53b53e5e3680c9db959151292423277bd48f6b404cd1:1:anchor:f8472371)
2. in the form now attached the Intellectual Property Law 2019: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: 8309c7e167d19956c92d7f1db1c878e6bbd66afd5eff176e025427e008105867:1:anchor:fa89ba03)
3. in the form now attached the Strata Title Law Amendment Law 2018: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: f513711cc3a06447b41a1b798acb1fae36a82ea4d95a0aa3977d4a71ea79d704:1:anchor:3327c4a0, 324b44750e9690ebf3204312bec975c1b1bca887c0c9d28666722d066e6ae114:0:0:78ff8820)
4. in the form now attached the Leasing Law 2020: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: 3efee4fe904cb89605ab5baee9f20a97242c4e40e9a496c682448f91c9515497:0:0:2c1c03d0, 5c9d86f9661b03024861c781332d81f275b34fc894d2d5bc11f9e0e1cfbb4b93:0:0:2c1c03d0)
5. in the form now attached the Common Reporting Standard Law 2018: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: d1a939b689b84a9dd683e3dfc93ccb238e310476f9c3249492cf09868852ebd9:1:anchor:3a89968b)

answer_text:
1. Each law’s interpretation section provides that a reference to a statutory provision includes that provision as amended or re-enacted from time to time (cite: bee43bdc6ca06c2a04f4126d4b94fa4be3d47a62e8b3bdd8d0ddce986dff25a6:38:0:38f43f85, fbdd7f9dd299d83b1f398778da2e6765dfaaed62005667264734a1f76ec09071:13:0:2b698f07, 607d58415d7bd7eb893678ef2bbbda6b4793c665efa5e3fd42ec206cf64a746a:13:0:2b698f07).
2. Each law defines “person” to include any natural person, body corporate or unincorporate, including partnerships, unincorporated associations, governments, or states (cite: bee43bdc6ca06c2a04f4126d4b94fa4be3d47a62e8b3bdd8d0ddce986dff25a6:38:0:38f43f85, fbdd7f9dd299d83b1f398778da2e6765dfaaed62005667264734a1f76ec09071:13:0:2b698f07, 607d58415d7bd7eb893678ef2bbbda6b4793c665efa5e3fd42ec206cf64a746a:13:0:2b698f07).
3. Each law states that an obligation to publish or cause to be published a document includes publishing in printed or electronic form unless otherwise provided (cite: bee43bdc6ca06c2a04f4126d4b94fa4be3d47a62e8b3bdd8d0ddce986dff25a6:38:0:38f43f85, fbdd7f9dd299d83b1f398778da2e6765dfaaed62005667264734a1f76ec09071:13:0:2b698f07, 607d58415d7bd7eb893678ef2bbbda6b4793c665efa5e3fd42ec206cf64a746a:13:0:2b698f07).

answer_text:
1. in the form now attached the Real Property Law Amendment Law 2024: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: a3ac668ff1a2630ae4826e239487862831558f29e896186631f72ab30a713ac4:1:anchor:1d5f1ed5, e822a7554e725938959c53b53e5e3680c9db959151292423277bd48f6b404cd1:1:anchor:f8472371)
2. in the form now attached the Digital Assets Law 2024: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: 849bf95cdc57e206fdab9597da97c15e608252902252e4ac6ac3c7cb1db89aa8:1:anchor:72624cd8, c850b3f04668abe265441e338a92d3ec1c547948b895cf1c27e4a7f2506bb130:1:anchor:2bc8e8a7)
3. in the form now attached the Leasing Law 2020: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: 3efee4fe904cb89605ab5baee9f20a97242c4e40e9a496c682448f91c9515497:1:anchor:1e739d3f, 5c9d86f9661b03024861c781332d81f275b34fc894d2d5bc11f9e0e1cfbb4b93:1:anchor:07bdb75d)
4. in the form now attached the Common Reporting Standard Law 2018: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: d1a939b689b84a9dd683e3dfc93ccb238e310476f9c3249492cf09868852ebd9:1:anchor:3a89968b)
5. in the form now attached the Intellectual Property Law 2019: Shall come into force on the 5th business day after enactment (not counting the day of enactment for this purpose) (cite: 8309c7e167d19956c92d7f1db1c878e6bbd66afd5eff176e025427e008105867:1:anchor:fa89ba03)
